confirm-race-first: Confirm your race and body options first.
select-subclass-first: Select a subclass before confirming your race.
select-profession-first: Select a profession before confirming your race.
race-body-effects:
Body: {0} HP, {1} melee, {2} movement, {3} hunger
Small-frame skill: {4} tool speed, {5} yield
race-body-trait: <font color="#e6c65c">• Body Stats</font> ({0} HP, {1} melee, {2} move, {3} hunger; {4} tools, {5} yield)
race-save-unavailable: The character customization service is not available. Your window has stayed open so you can try again.
race-save-timeout: Saving the character timed out. The window has stayed open and no success was reported.
race-save-rejected: The server rejected this character customization. Review the choices and try again.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-drago: Draconic blood lends strength, resilience, and a demanding metabolism.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-dwarf: Stone-born endurance and forge tradition make dwarves exceptional underground workers.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-elf: Keen senses and light-footed grace favor forests and ranged combat.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-gnome: Inventive underground folk who answer danger with mechanisms and cunning.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-golia: Giant ancestry grants a powerful frame built to endure harsh heights.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-halfl: Small, fortunate, and difficult to notice, halflings thrive through caution and luck.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-human: Ambitious and adaptable, humans improve many disciplines without mastering one by birth.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-orc: Endurance, determination, and sudden speed carry orcs through brutal encounters.
game:characterdesc-apprentice-race-tiefl: A fiendish legacy brings otherworldly power while unsettling ordinary creatures.
game:charattribute-animalSeekingRange--0: Animals detect you from 15% less distance
Animals detect you from 15% farther away
itemdesc-mastersurveykit: A durable Grandmaster instrument for condensed prospecting reports.
blockdesc-joinersbench: A Woodworker Grandmaster station for precision joinery.
itemdesc-graftingkit: A durable kit for advanced graft and seed work.
blockdesc-architectstable: A Builder Grandmaster station for structural templates.
itemdesc-masterforgeplans: Durable authorization plans for sealed cementation charges.
itemdesc-mastercookbook: A reusable reference for complete meals and preserved rations.
blockdesc-masterkiln: A Potter Grandmaster station for refractory components.
blockdesc-saddlersbench: A Leatherworker Grandmaster station for harness and armor fittings.
itemdesc-sewingkit: A durable kit for liners, padded clothing and repairs.
itemdesc-advancedtrapkit: A recoverable Hunter Grandmaster trap kit.
itemdesc-masterweaponpatterns: Durable Blacksmith patterns for advanced weapon heads.
itemdesc-veterinarykit: A durable Animal Husbandry kit for diagnosis and treatment.
blockdesc-framehive: A Beekeeper Grandmaster hive with removable-frame construction.
itemdesc-atlatl: A Spearman Grandmaster launcher for dedicated darts.
itemdesc-towershield: Strong frontal protection with substantial handling costs.
itemdesc-armorpaddingkit: A durable Tank Grandmaster fitting kit for replaceable liners.
blockdesc-cementationfurnace: A sealed, server-owned processor for exact advanced-metal charges.
itemdesc-grandmaster-refractory: A consumable liner for Starsteel cementation.
itemdesc-upgraded-refractory: A reinforced consumable liner for Aethersteel cementation.
itemdesc-blister-starsteel: A sealed-cementation work item. Heat and smith it on a suitable anvil.
itemdesc-blister-aethersteel: A tier-7 work item that can only be placed on a Starsteel anvil.
blockdesc-anvil-starsteel: A tier-6 anvil required for Aethersteel blister work.
itemdesc-venomberry: A fictional Apprentice poison ingredient. It is not food.
itemdesc-gloamcap: A fictional Apprentice mushroom used only in poison processing.
itemdesc-dangerous-tissue: A bonus material from danger-scaled creatures.
block-advancedtrap-triggered: Triggered Advanced Trap (hold right mouse for 5 seconds to reset)
itemdesc-poisonportion-mild: A non-food liquid used to coat supported arrow stacks in a barrel.
itemdesc-poisonportion-standard: A non-food liquid used to coat supported arrow stacks in a barrel.
itemdesc-poisonportion-potent: A non-food liquid used to coat supported arrow stacks in a barrel.
itemdesc-poisonportion-grandmaster: A Hive Alchemist poison; unauthorized shooters cannot apply its effect.
poison-arrow-effect: Poison: {0} damage/second for {1} seconds ({2} total damage).
itemdesc-arrow-poison-mild: Poisons a struck target for 0.2 damage per second for 8 seconds (up to 12 seconds when refreshed).
itemdesc-arrow-poison-standard: Poisons a struck target for 0.3 damage per second for 12 seconds (up to 18 seconds when refreshed).
itemdesc-arrow-poison-potent: Poisons a struck target for 0.4 damage per second for 16 seconds (up to 24 seconds when refreshed).
itemdesc-arrow-poison-grandmaster: Poisons a struck target for 0.5 damage per second for 20 seconds (up to 30 seconds when refreshed). Requires Hive Alchemist mastery.
